[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 001001101 4
1 111011001 6
2 101100111 6
3 101100011 5
4 001110011 5
5 110110011 6
6 111111111 a
7 111111111 a

50 05 111111111 a match 6 7
